DP.134.0000:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!
Please, can you help me?\f
I dropped my Pokédex by accident,
and Team Galactic found it.\f
Now they won’t give it back.
Please, I need your help.\f
I’ll be waiting in front of the
warehouses. Please come!\f
DP.134.0001:
Lucas: Hey! [0103,0000]!
Listen, I need your help...\f
I dropped my Pokédex by accident,
and Team Galactic found it.\f
Now they won’t give it back.
Please, I need you to help me.\f
I’ll be waiting in front of the
warehouses. Please come!\f
DP.134.0002:
Dawn: [0103,0000], are you going
to take the Gym challenge?\f
Gee, you keep getting tougher and
tougher, don’t you?\f
Me? Well, I went shopping at the
department store, and...\f
I mean, well, of course I’ve been
working on my Pokédex, but...\f
I’ll catch you later!\f
DP.134.0003:
Lucas: Hey! [0103,0000], are you
going to take on the Gym Leader?\f
Wow, you just keep getting tougher
and tougher.\f
Me? Well, I took a look in the
Game Corner, and...\f
I mean, yeah, of course I’ve been
working on my Pokédex, but...\f
Anyways, keep it up!
I’ll see you around!\f
DP.134.0004:
Grunt 1: Hey, you!
Yeah, you!\f
This is Team Galactic’s warehouse!
It ain’t no playground for kids!\f
DP.134.0005:
Grunt 1: Hey, you!
Yeah, you!\f
This is Team Galactic’s warehouse!
It ain’t no playground for kids!
DP.134.0006:
Grunt 2: This is the awesome Team
Galactic’s awesome warehouse!\f
A little kid like you should be playing
at the Pokémon Gym.\f
After all, the Gym Leader happens to
be a kid just like you!
DP.134.0007:
Grunt 1: What? Now you’ve brought
your buddy along so you can get your\r
Pokédex back?\f
We’ll be just as happy to send both
of you crying home to your mommies!
DP.134.0008:
Grunt 2: You’re trying to get the
Pokédex back from us?\f
Not when we, Team Galactic, can make
so much better use of it!\f
But, OK, guarding the warehouse
does get boring!\f
We’ll take you on two-on-two!
DP.134.0009:
Grunt 1: Aww, that stinks!
Our Pokémon are chumps!\f
We should get new ones from
headquarters.\f
Humph! Who cares about some
Pokédex anyways?\f
Team Galactic’s going to own
all the Pokémon in the world...\r
No, in the universe!\f
DP.134.0010:
There! Take it!
Take your Pokédex!\f
DP.134.0011:
Grunt 2: Those things we had in
the warehouse’ve already been moved\r
to Pastoria City anyway...\f
So, we’ll say “You’ll get yours!”
And run like the grunts we are.\f
DP.134.0012:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!
Please, can you help me?\f
I dropped my Pokédex by accident,
and Team Galactic found it.\f
Now they won’t give it back.
Please, I need your help.\r
Team up and battle with me!
DP.134.0013:
Dawn: You and your Pokémon together
with me and my Pokémon...\f
United like this, our dream team
has no chance of losing!\f
I’m not letting those bad people get
away with their dirty deeds!\f
DP.134.0014:
Dawn: I’ll be waiting.
Please get ready and come quickly.
DP.134.0015:
Dawn: What’s going on?\f
Why is Team Galactic out in the
streets like they own the place?\f
DP.134.0016:
Dawn: [0103,0000], thank you,
sincerely.\f
If Professor Rowan ever finds out that
I lost my Pokédex...\f
Eewww...
I don’t want to think about it.\f
So, [0103,0000], what are you going
to do now?\f
I’m thinking of going to Pastoria
City now.\f
The Great Marsh there is home to
many kinds of Pokémon.\f
DP.134.0017:
Lucas: Hey! [0103,0000]!
Listen, I need your help...\f
I dropped my Pokédex by accident,
and Team Galactic found it.\f
Now they won’t give it back.
Please, I need you to help me.\f
Will you team up with me to take
them on?
DP.134.0018:
Lucas: You and your Pokémon together
with me and my Pokémon...\f
Our dream team’s not going to lose.
Not with the way we work together!\f
I’m not letting those criminals get
away with this!\f
DP.134.0019:
Lucas: I’ll be waiting!
Get ready and come quick!
DP.134.0020:
Lucas: What’s going on here?\f
Why is Team Galactic out in the
streets like they own the place?\f
DP.134.0021:
Lucas: [0103,0000], thanks,
honestly.\f
If Professor Rowan ever hears that
I lost my Pokédex...\f
Oh, man, that’s something I do not
want to think about!\f
So, [0103,0000], what are your
plans now?\f
I’m going off to Pastoria City.\f
The Great Marsh there has all kinds
of Pokémon.\f
DP.134.0022:
There!
Would you look at those antennae?\f
I don’t know what they do, but those
are some mighty impressive antennae!\f
DP.134.0023:
Hey!
It’s you!\f
I bet you don’t remember me, but
I sure remember you!\f
Because of you, they took my CLEFAIRY
away...\f
My partner called it quits and went
back to his old country...\f
I don’t know anything about any
Storage Key!\f
DP.134.0024:
We have the Hidden Machine that teaches
Fly stored in the warehouse.\f
They said I can use it if I show them
that I deserve it.
DP.134.0025:
Yeah, Team Galactic is hiding all sorts
of good stuff in their warehouse.\f
I hear they even have a Hidden
Machine in there!
DP.134.0026:
The Game Corner is dangerous!\f
Why is it dangerous?
It’s so fun, I lose track of time!
DP.134.0027:
I got a TM as a prize from the
Game Corner.\f
I used it on my Pokémon right away!
DP.134.0029:
Maylene is Veilstone’s Gym Leader.
Wake’s the Gym Leader in Pastoria.\r
Then, there’s Fantina in Hearthome...\f
They’re all way too tough.
I can’t even come close to them.
DP.134.0030:
I came to this city just so I could
go shopping at the department store.\f
But with all these rock walls around,
this place feels kind of cold.
DP.134.0031:
I bought a new parasol.\f
But I don’t want it to get rained on,
so I watch the TV weather reports.
DP.134.0032:
Do you know where one might find
a Coin Case?\f
I heard that there’s a clown giving
’em away, but...
DP.134.0034:
Veilstone is the city of stone.
We even have meteorites!\f
This has nothing to do with anything,
but take this Technical Machine!\f
DP.134.0035:
If someone uses Embargo on your
Pokémon, it becomes impossible to\r
use any items on it.\f
Anyway, enjoy your visit to Veilstone,
the city of...well, stone.
DP.134.0036:
It’s a mysterious meteorite that
fell from the stars...
DP.134.0037:
Touching the meteorite boosted
the Speed of a certain Pokémon.
DP.134.0038:
Touching the meteorite heightened
the defensive capabilities of\r
a certain Pokémon.
DP.134.0039:
Touching the meteorite heightened
the offensive capabilities of\r
a certain Pokémon.
DP.134.0040:
Touching the meteorite balanced out
the attributes of a certain Pokémon.
DP.134.0042:
Veilstone City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Maylene\r
The Barefoot, Fighting Genius!
DP.134.0044:
Galactic Veilstone Building
We Dream of the Universe!
DP.134.0045:
Veilstone Department Store
A Shop Full of Dreams!
DP.134.0046:
Veilstone Game Corner
Aim for an Explosion of Luck!
DP.134.0047:
Prize Exchange
Coins Exchanged for Prizes!
DP.134.0048:
Visit Beautiful Lake Valor!
Right off Rt. 214!
